name_cn:
Genuine quality
MATELASSE MONOCHROME New Color Quilted Denim Leather Chain Shoulder Bag
A brand-new iconic design and quilted silhouette
Unique quilting craftsmanship outlines a modern silhouette, highlighting a rich texture
Metal LOGO focuses on eye-catching details
Pair with loose jackets and jeans
Radiating a casual French vibe
Model: 111272 Denim
Dimensions: 24x15x5cm (with original packaging)
